summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PAYC is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $125.82. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 87.5%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $137.61 and a significant trendline confluence around $136.19 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
